title: stisseria rugosa
intro: Stisseria rugosa, also known as Strophanthus gratus or Strophanthus rugosa, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It is a climbing plant native to tropical Africa, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant's extracts are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Stisseria rugosa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies to treat various ailments, making it a valuable plant in folk medicine.
